title: List of ancient Egyptian royal consorts
body: This is a list of known royal consorts of ancient Egypt from c. 3100 BC to 30 BC. Reign dates follow those included on the list of pharaohs page. Some information is debatable and interpretations of available evidence can vary between Egyptologists.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from October 2020
